name: International Karate
description: International Karate is a one-on-one fighting game featuring a single player character facing a series of opponents from different countries, each representing a unique martial arts style. The game utilizes a side-on perspective. The player controls their character through a variety of punches, kicks, blocks, and jumps. Each successful hit earns the player points. The player advances to the next stage after defeating a certain number of opponents. The environments are based on various locations around the world. The objective is to achieve the highest score by defeating all opponents with strategic attacks and defensive maneuvers. The game is structured as a series of individual matches against progressively more challenging opponents. A successful attack depends on the player's timing and distance from the opponent. Different moves are more effective against certain opponent stances or attack types. The player has a health bar, and the match is won by depleting the opponent's health bar entirely, or by achieving a higher score by the end of the time limit.
